skills.name: invoice-match-verify
skills.description: Match target invoice rows to structured OFCO reference lines and verify amount tolerance with evidence-backed scoring.

skills.name: cost-center-mapper
skills.description: Map subject and tariff patterns into COST MAIN, COST CENTER A/B, PRICE CENTER, and immutable qty/amount fields.

skills.name: vendor-invoice-grouping
skills.description: Group normalized lines by vendor_invoice_no, infer invoice type with tariff-first rules, and calculate per-group totals.

skills.name: ofco-lines-export
skills.description: Export standardized OFCO, SAFEEN, and ADP lines into the fixed Lines schema with calc checks and evidence fields.

skills.name: flow-code-validator
skills.description: Infer and validate Flow Code 0-5 using destination, warehouse leg, and MOSB leg rules for HVDC logistics.
